Trusted by leading organizations

J.P. MorganGoldman SachsMcKinsey & CompanyrampBrexVercelNotionand more

A better way to hire.

Traditional hiring relies on imperfect proxies. Fydell simulations show you what candidates can actually do, in realistic scenarios that mirror real work.

Real work, real decisions

Candidates step into realistic scenarios and make decisions like they would on the job.

Data you can trust

Our simulations are validated, role-specific, and designed to predict performance.

Fairer for everyone

Every candidate gets the same opportunity to show their skills: structured, consistent, objective.

Faster, smarter hiring

Automated scoring and insights help your team make confident decisions, faster.

How it works

The closest thing to the actual job.

Fydell simulates real work so teams can watch candidates think, decide, and perform in the moments that matter, then turn it into structured evidence.

01

Send a simulation

Pick a role-specific simulation or generate one, then invite candidates with a single link.

02

Watch real work

Candidates work through realistic tasks while every decision and artifact is captured.

03

Review the signal

Get structured, evidence-based reports your hiring committee can actually decide on.
